The '''''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising''''' trade paperback is a graphic novel collecting both issues in the ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising]]'' series of [[Star Wars comic books|comics]]. It was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[December 17]], [[1997]].

{{Comics-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''Determined to uproot Sith magic from Onderon, Jedi Master Arca orders the sarcophagi of Queen Amanoa and Dark Jedi Freedon Nadd removed to the Dxun moon. When the spirit-avatar of Nadd appears and captures Arca, Ulic Qel-Droma faces the task of saving Arca ''and'' the planet from being completely swallowed by evil.''

==Contents==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 1]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]]
